agent planner selected child issue delegation: Continue the issue #104 sequential child plan. Children #90, #95, and #105 have finished with SHIP; #86 is the only remaining listed issue and should stack on the current open chain ending at PR #113.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777778093418 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUyNjg0MDQyMTQ6b3JjaGVzdHJhdGU6ODY6aW1wbGVtZW50Ojg2OjI -->

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-86/codex-25268550985`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/114

Added best-effort GitHub sub-issue linking for delegated child issues while preserving trusted marker/comment fallback behavior when the API is unavailable or rejects a link. Updated orchestration docs and verified with `npm run build`, focused orchestrator handoff CLI tests, and `git diff --check`.

title: Orchestrate to link existing issues as sub issues (or provide relations)?
